gist.headline: Wish upon a bee
gist.blurb: WishCraft just landed in the greenhouse. It's a new community app that uses AI to generate daily affirmations and goal visualization boards.
gist.summary: Added WishCraft, a new community app for generating AI-driven affirmations and goal visualizations, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use WishCraft to create daily prompts and visualization boards for their goals.
gist.visual_concept: The app is called 'WishCraft' and focuses on affirmations and goals. Visual symbols: a vision board, glowing stars/wishes, magic wand. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a little wizard hat, looking at a glowing vision board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, waving a small glowing wand at a corkboard filled with glowing pixelated stars and affirmation notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
